telegram.text:
Iran hits Gulf states and Jordan after seventh night of US strikes

Iran launched more attacks on Washington's Gulf allies and ​Jordan on Saturday after a seventh straight night of U.S. strikes on Iranian military targets, escalating the war one week after a ceasefire collapsed.

Kuwait came under sustained attack, with a ‌desalination plant hit and operations at Kuwait International Airport suspended due to repeated missile and drone threats.

read more
